task_completion.description: Create the Solid State page with a rectangle and at least 9 blue circles
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page titled 'Solid State' containing a drawn rectangle. Inside the rectangle, there must be at least 9 blue circles.

task_completion.description: Create the Liquid State page with a rectangle and at least 9 blue circles
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page titled 'Liquid State' containing a drawn rectangle. Inside the rectangle, there must be at least 9 blue circles.

task_completion.description: Create the Gas State page with a rectangle and at least 5 red circles
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page titled 'Gas State' containing a drawn rectangle. Inside the rectangle, there must be at least 5 red circles.

task_completion.description: Arrange particles according to their state of matter
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify the arrangement of the circles: on the Solid page, the blue circles should be tightly packed together; on the Liquid page, the blue circles should be loosely arranged; on the Gas page, the red circles should be spread out/moving freely.

task_completion.description: Save the flipchart to the specified directory with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/' and the filename 'particle_model.flipchart', or the application title bar showing 'particle_model.flipchart' after saving.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire application to create the flipchart
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ActivInspire interface being actively used to draw shapes and add text, rather than a terminal script generating the file.

integrity.description: The agent drew actual shapes rather than importing a pre-made image
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the shape tool being used in ActivInspire, rather than an image file being dragged and dropped or inserted onto the canvas.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interactions
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands that directly write or manipulate the .flipchart file contents to bypass manual creation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The flipchart must be saved exactly as 'particle_model.flipchart' in '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/'. It must contain exactly 3 pages. Page 1 must include the text 'Solid', a rectangle, and >= 9 blue circles. Page 2 must include the text 'Liquid', a rectangle, and >= 9 blue circles. Page 3 must include the text 'Gas', a rectangle, and >= 5 red circles.
